name: Lunuganga Estate
description: The former country estate of renowned architect Geoffrey Bawa, featuring beautifully landscaped gardens, tranquil lakes, tropical vegetation, elegant architecture, and peaceful walking paths. One of Sri Lanka's finest design destinations.

name: Ceylon Tea Trails
description: A collection of luxury colonial tea bungalows overlooking Castlereagh Reservoir, offering tea estate experiences, gourmet dining, hiking, and one of Sri Lanka's finest luxury retreats.

name: Jaffna Fort
description: A historic Dutch fort overlooking the Jaffna Lagoon, offering panoramic views, colonial architecture, peaceful surroundings, and one of northern Sri Lanka's most significant cultural landmarks.

name: The Fortress Resort & Spa
description: A luxurious beachfront resort overlooking the Indian Ocean with contemporary architecture, infinity pools, fine dining, spa treatments, and one of the most relaxing luxury escapes on Sri Lanka's southern coast.

name: Kalpitiya Lagoon
description: A spectacular lagoon famous for kite surfing, dolphin watching, mangrove ecosystems, kayaking, and peaceful sunsets. One of Sri Lanka's best destinations for water sports and eco-tourism.

name: Hummanaya Blow Hole
description: The largest known natural blowhole in Sri Lanka, where powerful ocean waves shoot water high into the air through a coastal rock formation. A spectacular natural attraction for photographers and ocean lovers.

name: Embilipitiya Walawe Park
description: A peaceful lakeside public park with walking paths, gardens, shaded seating areas, and scenic views over Chandrika Lake. Ideal for evening walks, families, and relaxing in nature.

name: Gal Oya National Park
description: A unique national park centered around Senanayake Samudraya, famous for boat safaris where elephants can sometimes be seen swimming between islands. Rich in wildlife, forests, and untouched natural beauty.

name: The Tuna & The Crab
description: A premium seafood restaurant in Galle created through a collaboration between Japanese and Sri Lankan culinary experts, known for fresh seafood, sushi, tuna dishes, and elegant dining.

name: Dambulla Royal Cave Temple
description: Sri Lanka's largest and best-preserved cave temple complex featuring magnificent Buddha statues, ancient murals, panoramic viewpoints, and over 2,000 years of history.

name: Madulsima Mini World's End
description: A breathtaking cliff-top viewpoint offering sunrise views above the clouds, rolling mountains, tea plantations, and one of Sri Lanka's most underrated hiking destinations.

name: Delft Island
description: A remote island off the Jaffna Peninsula known for its wild horses, coral walls, Dutch history, ancient baobab tree, and peaceful landscapes unlike anywhere else in Sri Lanka.

name: Bambarakanda Falls
description: Sri Lanka's tallest waterfall, cascading 263 meters through a pine forest and surrounded by hiking trails, mountain scenery, and cool highland air.

name: Madu River
description: A biodiverse river ecosystem famous for mangrove boat safaris, small islands, birdlife, cinnamon cultivation, and peaceful nature experiences on Sri Lanka's southwest coast.

name: Mannar Baobab Tree
description: One of the oldest and largest baobab trees in Sri Lanka, believed to have been brought by Arab traders centuries ago. A unique natural landmark and one of the country's most unusual attractions.

name: Adam's Bridge (Rama Setu)
description: A chain of limestone shoals stretching between Sri Lanka and India. Rich in geological, historical, and religious significance, it is one of South Asia's most fascinating natural landmarks.

name: Jaffna Public Library
description: One of Asia's most historically significant public libraries, beautifully rebuilt and surrounded by peaceful gardens. A symbol of education, resilience and Tamil heritage.

name: St. Clair's Falls
description: Often called the 'Little Niagara of Sri Lanka', St. Clair's Falls is one of the country's widest waterfalls, surrounded by lush tea estates and scenic viewpoints.

name: Kirinda Raja Maha Viharaya
description: A beautiful Buddhist temple dramatically located on a rocky headland overlooking the Indian Ocean. Famous for its panoramic sea views and the legend of Princess Viharamahadevi.

name: Thiruketheeswaram Temple
description: One of Sri Lanka's five ancient Shiva temples, renowned for its Dravidian architecture, spiritual significance, colorful gopuram, and peaceful surroundings near Mannar.

name: Marble Beach
description: A picturesque white-sand beach with calm turquoise water, surrounded by forested hills. Famous for its crystal-clear sea, swimming conditions, and peaceful atmosphere.

name: Buduruwagala Temple
description: An ancient Buddhist temple famous for its seven massive rock-carved statues, including a 16-meter standing Buddha. One of Sri Lanka's most impressive archaeological sites.

name: Kanneliya Rainforest Reserve
description: A pristine tropical rainforest rich in biodiversity, waterfalls, endemic birds, rare plants, and scenic hiking trails. One of Sri Lanka's best rainforest experiences outside Sinharaja.

name: Wild Coast Tented Lodge
description: An award-winning luxury safari lodge bordering Yala National Park, featuring uniquely designed cocoon-shaped tents, gourmet dining, wildlife encounters, and one of Sri Lanka's most exclusive hospitality experiences.

name: Graze Kitchen
description: A renowned international buffet restaurant at Hilton Colombo offering live cooking stations, premium seafood, Sri Lankan specialties, and one of the city's best buffet experiences.

name: Heritance Kandalama
description: An iconic luxury hotel designed by Geoffrey Bawa, seamlessly blending into the surrounding forest and overlooking Kandalama Lake. One of Sri Lanka's most architecturally celebrated hotels.

name: Cinnabar Resort
description: A stylish boutique beachfront resort offering contemporary rooms, an infinity pool, excellent hospitality, and direct access to one of Sri Lanka's best surfing beaches.

name: Rare at Residence
description: A sophisticated steakhouse and fine dining restaurant in Colombo, renowned for premium meats, seafood, elegant interiors, and exceptional service.

name: Marino Mall
description: A modern shopping mall connected to Marino Beach Colombo, offering fashion stores, restaurants, cafés, entertainment, and panoramic rooftop ocean views.
